    grid_fill = (triton.cdiv(M, BLOCK_M),)
    _fill_kernel[grid_fill](yf, M, BLOCK_M=BLOCK_M, num_warps=4)

    grid = (M, SPLIT)
    _row_max_kernel[grid](x, yf, x.stride(0), N,
                          SPLIT=SPLIT, BLOCK_N=BLOCK_N, num_warps=4)

    _finalize_kernel[grid_fill](yf, y, M, BLOCK_M=BLOCK_M, num_warps=4)
    return y
